extensionName.description: Extension name displayed in Thunderbird Add-on Manager

extensionDescription.message: Importe e-mails, anexos e links diretamente para o Google NotebookLM com um único clique.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description displayed in Thunderbird Add-on Manager

stateAuthRequired.description: Heading shown when authentication is needed

stateAuthRequiredBody.message: Conecte sua conta do Google para começar a importar e-mails para o NotebookLM.
stateAuthRequiredBody.description: Explanation text in the auth-required state

btnConnect.description: Button to open the NotebookLM auth tab

labelSubject.description: Label for the email subject metadata row

labelFrom.description: Label for the email sender metadata row

labelDate.description: Label for the email date metadata row

placeholderSearch.description: Placeholder text for the Fast Research notebook search input

btnCreateNotebook.description: Button to create a new notebook

loadingNotebooks.description: Shown while notebooks are being fetched

noNotebookFound.description: Shown when notebook list is empty or search has no results

errNoNotebook.description: Error when user tries to import without selecting a notebook

btnPdf.description: Button to import email as PDF

btnMd.description: Button to import email as Markdown text

intentNoteLabelVisible.description: Label for the intent note textarea

intentNotePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the intent note textarea

labelAttachments.description: Label above the attachment checkboxes list

labelAccount.description: Label above the account switcher dropdown

statusCapturing.description: Shown while the PDF or Markdown is being generated

statusUploading.description: Shown while the file is being uploaded to NotebookLM

statusBatchProgress.description: Progress message during grouped attachment import

btnOpenNotebook.description: Button to open the notebook after a successful import

btnDownload.description: Button to download the generated PDF or MD file locally

btnBack.description: Button to return to the READY state after an error

btnNewImport.description: Button to start a new import after success

errorApiChanged.message: A API do NotebookLM foi modificada. Atualização necessária.

errorAuthExpired.message: Sessão expirada. Faça login no NotebookLM novamente.

errorUploadSessionMissing.message: Erro ao inicializar o upload. Tente novamente.

errorTimeout.message: A solicitação expirou. Verifique sua conexão.

errorInjectionFailed.message: Não é possível ativar o clipper neste e-mail.

errorNoEmailDisplayed.message: Abra um e-mail para usar esta extensão.

errorEmptyEmailBody.message: Este e-mail não contém conteúdo importável.

errorAttachmentTooLarge.message: Este arquivo excede o limite de 200 MB.

errorUnknown.message: Ocorreu um erro. Verifique o console para obter detalhes.

btnReconnect.description: Button shown after AUTH_EXPIRED to re-open the auth tab

warningPartialImport.description: Warning shown in SUCCESS state when some attachments failed

attachmentUnknownType.message: Tipo desconhecido — será importado como texto
attachmentUnknownType.description: Badge shown next to an attachment with no recognized type — imported as plain text only if explicitly checked (code review 2026-06-10)

labelDateUnknown.description: Label displayed when the email has no parsable date (code review 2026-06-10)

createNotebookPlaceholder.description: Placeholder of the inline notebook-creation input (sprint 2 v1.0.5)

btnCreateConfirm.description: Tooltip of the confirm (✓) button in the inline creation row

btnCreateCancel.description: Tooltip of the cancel (✕) button in the inline creation row

statusCreatingNotebook.description: Status text shown while the notebook is being created

errorCreateNotebook.message: Não foi possível criar o caderno. Tente novamente.
errorCreateNotebook.description: Inline error shown when notebook creation fails

mdLabelIntention.description: Label for research intention note in Markdown generator

mdLabelEmail.description: Label for email section in Markdown generator

mdLabelFrom.description: Label for sender field in Markdown generator

mdLabelSubject.description: Label for subject field in Markdown generator

mdLabelDate.description: Label for date field in Markdown generator

mdContentUnavailable.description: Fallback text when email body is empty in Markdown generator

pdfLabelIntention.description: Header for research intention note in PDF generator

pdfLabelEmail.description: Header for email section in PDF generator

pdfLabelSubject.description: Label for subject in PDF generator (padded for alignment)

pdfLabelFrom.description: Label for sender in PDF generator (padded for alignment)

pdfLabelTo.description: Label for recipient in PDF generator (padded for alignment)

pdfLabelDate.description: Label for date in PDF generator (padded for alignment)

errorNoAttachmentSelected.description: Error when attempting to import attachments without checking any

errorPdfCaptureInProgress.message: Uma captura de PDF já está em andamento.
errorPdfCaptureInProgress.description: Error when attempting a capture while another is running

errorAllAttachmentsFailed.message: Falha ao importar todos os anexos: $DETAILS$
errorAllAttachmentsFailed.description: Error message when all attachments fail during import

labelNoSubject.description: Fallback text when email has no subject

labelUnknown.description: Fallback text when metadata is unknown
